title: ElectrochemicalMethodology
description: Schema for extracting electrochemical measurement methodology from scientific articles on hard carbon anodes in sodium-ion batteries.

counter_electrode.description: Counter electrode material used in the cell, e.g. 'sodium metal', 'NVP (Na3V2(PO4)3)'.

evidence.description: Exact text snippet from the article supporting the extracted counter electrode.

additive.description: Conductive additive used in the electrode slurry, e.g. 'Super P', 'carbon black', 'acetylene black', 'Ketjen black'.

evidence.description: Exact text snippet from the article supporting the extracted additive.

binder.description: Binder material used in the electrode slurry, e.g. 'PVDF', 'CMC', 'SBR', 'PAA'. Include full name if given.

evidence.description: Exact text snippet from the article supporting the extracted binder.

current_collector.description: Material used as the current collector for the working electrode, e.g. 'Al foil', 'Cu foil', 'carbon-coated aluminium foil'.

evidence.description: Exact text snippet from the article supporting the extracted current collector.

active_mass_loading.description: Areal mass loading of the electrode slurry on the current collector, typically in mg cm-2. Report as a range if given, e.g. '1.0-1.5 mg cm-2'.

evidence.description: Exact text snippet from the article supporting the extracted mass loading.

electrode_composition.description: Weight ratio of active material, conductive additive, and binder, e.g. '80:10:10', '90:5:5'.

evidence.description: Exact text snippet from the article supporting the extracted electrode composition.

slurry_solvent.description: Solvent used for preparing the electrode slurry, e.g. 'NMP (N-methyl-2-pyrrolidone)', 'deionised water', 'DI water'.

evidence.description: Exact text snippet from the article supporting the extracted slurry solvent.

electrolyte_salt.description: Chemical formula or name of the electrolyte salt, e.g. 'NaClO4', 'NaPF6', 'NaTFSI'.

evidence.description: Exact text snippet from the article supporting the extracted electrolyte salt.

electrolyte_concentration.description: Concentration of the electrolyte salt, e.g. '1 M', '0.8 mol L-1'.

evidence.description: Exact text snippet from the article supporting the extracted electrolyte concentration.

electrolyte_solvents.description: Comma-separated list of solvents used in the electrolyte, e.g. 'ethylene carbonate (EC), propylene carbonate (PC)' or 'EC, DEC'.

evidence.description: Exact text snippet from the article supporting the extracted electrolyte solvents.

electrolyte_solvent_ratio.description: Volume or weight ratio of the electrolyte solvents, e.g. '1:1 v/v', '1:1:1 vol%'.

evidence.description: Exact text snippet from the article supporting the extracted solvent ratio.

cell_type.description: Type of electrochemical cell including format code if mentioned, e.g. 'coin cell CR2032', 'Swagelok cell', 'pouch cell'.

evidence.description: Exact text snippet from the article supporting the extracted cell type.

separator.description: Separator material used in the cell, e.g. 'glass fiber', 'Celgard 2400', 'polypropylene membrane'.

evidence.description: Exact text snippet from the article supporting the extracted separator.

cycling_instrument.description: Battery cycler or instrument used for electrochemical testing, e.g. 'LAND CT2001A', 'Neware BTS4000', 'Arbin BT-2000'.

evidence.description: Exact text snippet from the article supporting the extracted cycling instrument.

voltage_window.description: Voltage range used for galvanostatic cycling, including reference if given, e.g. '0.01-2.0 V vs Na/Na+'.

evidence.description: Exact text snippet from the article supporting the extracted voltage window.
